title: Media Plan Schema
description: Schema for a store-level media asset planning artifact in store-os. This plan defines what media assets are needed, by page type and section role, at what priority, and what sourcing work remains. It is a planning artifact only — not an asset inventory, not a confirmed asset availability report, and not a production-ready asset manifest.

plan_name.description: Human-readable name for this store's media plan. Recommended pattern: '[Store Vertical] Media Plan — [Primary Goal]'.

media_goal.description: Primary strategic intent driving this media plan. Derived from homepage-strategy, brand-positioning, and design-system media_strategy.

page_type_coverage.description: Per-page-type media coverage plan. Each entry defines what asset types are required vs optional, and at what priority.

required_asset_types.description: Asset types that are functionally required for this page type to render correctly and meet strategic goals.

optional_asset_types.description: Asset types that enhance this page type but are not required for baseline rendering or strategic goals.

media_priority.description: Implementation priority for media on this page type. Derived from homepage-strategy, section roles, and brand-positioning.

notes.description: Any additional notes about media requirements, constraints, or open questions for this page type.

planned_asset_slots.description: Individual planned asset slot definitions. Each slot represents one needed asset in the store's media plan — its role, sourcing status, and constraints. These are planning slots, not confirmed available assets.

slot_id.description: Unique identifier for this asset slot within the plan. Recommended pattern: '{page_type}-{media_role}-{index}'.

asset_type.description: Broad category of the asset type for this slot.

section_role.description: The section role this asset serves. Derived from section-plan and homepage-strategy section_sequence.

media_role.description: Functional media role for this asset slot.

required.description: Whether this slot represents a required asset (true) or an optional enhancement (false). Defaults to false when absent.

availability_status.description: Current availability status of this asset slot. 'planned' = asset is expected to be available from known source. 'requires-sourcing' = asset must be actively sourced. 'requires-creation' = asset must be created (photography, design). 'placeholder' = temporary placeholder exists. 'unavailable' = no known path to asset availability. 'requires-review' = source exists but requires review before use.

seo_role.description: SEO role of this asset slot. Decorative assets do not need alt text optimization. Index-relevant and answer-supporting assets require careful alt text and schema planning.

performance_risk.description: Performance risk classification for this asset slot. High-risk slots require review before production deployment.

mobile_fallback_required.description: Whether this asset slot requires a separate mobile-optimized fallback asset.

alt_text_guidance.description: Planning-level guidance on alt text direction for this asset slot. Not a finalized alt text value.

sourcing_notes.description: Notes on expected sourcing path, constraints, or open questions for this asset slot.

asset_gap_policy.description: Policy for handling missing or unavailable assets throughout implementation. Defines conservative defaults for gap situations.

missing_source_handling.description: Default handling when an asset source is missing. Conservative default: flag-for-review.

placeholder_allowed.description: Whether temporary placeholder images are allowed during development and staging. Must be false for production.

unavailable_asset_escalation.description: What happens when an asset is marked unavailable and no fallback exists.

sourcing_requirements_summary.description: Summary of sourcing work required to fulfill this media plan. Not an asset inventory — a planning-level summary of effort and gaps.

assets_requiring_photography.description: Estimated number of asset slots requiring original photography.

assets_requiring_design.description: Estimated number of asset slots requiring custom design or graphic creation.

assets_requiring_supplier_sourcing.description: Estimated number of asset slots that can be fulfilled from supplier-provided materials.

assets_with_no_known_source.description: Estimated number of asset slots with no known sourcing path — these are blocking gaps.

high_performance_risk_count.description: Number of planned asset slots with performance_risk = high. Requires review before deployment.

notes.description: General notes about this media plan, open questions, or assumptions made during synthesis.
